title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Runwal Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Runwal Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Runwal Group in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Runwal Group:
Runwal Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Runwal Group!
